LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DOMILITA DENIZ MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO CCP 1005. THE MOTION WAS SERVED ON JANUARY 17, 2017 AND IT DOES NOT PROVIDE THE REQUISITE 16-COURT-DAY NOTICE. THE PROOF OF SERVICE AND MOTION ALSO FAIL TO INDICATE WHETHER THE CLIENT WAS SERVED WITH THE MOTION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: GENA EALES, CSR NO. 9176, EMAIL: GEALES@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-24-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH JAN-23-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DOMILITA DENIZ SHALL RECOVER $0 FROM DEFENDANT SABELLA & LATORRE, BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY AGAINST THE DEFENDANT; EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT SABELLA & LA TORRE MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN ALL RESPECTS DUE TO NO OPPOSITION BEING FILED. THE COURT SPECIFICALLY RULES THAT: A. EACH MATTER SPECIFIED IN THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS IS ESTABLISHED AS TRUE DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. B. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $450 TO DEFENDANT SABELLA & LA TORRE FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEYS' FEES INCURRED BY THE MOVING PARTY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Continued To Feb-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Self-represented Plaintiff. Amy E. Blair, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended through January 23, 2018. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to February 27, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. AMY E. BLAIR, ESQ. of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego (Tel: 510-457-3468) appearing fordefendant Sabella & La Torre;
No appearance made by or for plaintiff.

DEFENDANT SABELLA & LA TORRE Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem. Argument presented by defense counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is granted in all respects due to no opposition being filed. The Court specifically rules that: A. Each matter specified in the Requests for Admissions is established as true due to plaintiff's failure to respond to the Requests for Admission. B. Plaintiff shall pay $450 to defendant Sabella & La Torre for reasonable expenses and attorneys' fees incurred by the moving party.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BENNETT GLEN, TEL. NO. 1-925-957-6723, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. BENNETT GLEN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF DOMILITA DENIZ is taken off calendar. Substitution of attorney was filed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HEK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DOMILITA DENIZ MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is taken off calendar pursuant to CCP 1005. The motion was served on January 17, 2017 and it does not provide the requisite 16-court-day notice. The proof of service and motion also fail to indicate whether the client was served with the motion. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR No. 9176, Email: geales@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
